arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. West Ham United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham Make Contact to Sign 'Magnificent' Star Alongside Ferguson
arts.sum: West Ham are set to confirm the loan signing of Evan Ferguson but another temporary star may join late in the window

arts.ttl: Report: Todd Boehly completes deal to sign top youngster for Chelsea’s partner club Strasbourg
arts.sum: While signings are not flying through the door at Stamford Bridge, it looks as if the Chelsea ownership team are still working hard in the...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Manchester City starlet on Enzo Maresca radar ahead of deadline day?
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly make contact with Manchester City regarding the availability of one of their star academy graduates.

arts.ttl: Report shares when West Ham intend to announce new signing
arts.sum: Evan Ferguson will not be eligible to face Chelsea as West Ham United aim to announce the signing ahead of the Premier League clash, according... The post Report shares when West Ham intend to announce new signing appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi: Chelsea, Aston Villa & Tottenham locked in transfer stand-off
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Axel Disasi has reportedly found himself at the epicentre of a transfer stand-off between Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter: Chelsea sack was 'the best thing that happened to me'
arts.sum: West Ham head coach Graham Potter has opened up on his dire spell at Chelsea and does not regret this 'learning experience' at all. Potter had been out of a job for almost two years after his sacking by Chelsea in April 2022 following a brief but intense spell at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca is now 'seriously considering' dropping one Chelsea star for West Ham clash - journalist
arts.sum: He's got a decision to make.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano makes Chelsea transfer prediction and says 'It's going to be crazy'
arts.sum: The final few hours of Chelsea's January transfer window are expected to be ‘crazy’, according to transfer expert Fabrizio Romano. Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'close' to sanctioning another transfer ahead of deadline day
arts.sum: Santos have until February 28 until the transfer window in Brazil closes, which allows plenty of time to strike a deal to sign Washington on loan from Chelsea. However, the move was never completed and Washington would go on to remain at Stamford Bridge, but appears close to leaving the club 18 months after his arrival.
